---
title: "Lecture 20: Revision - Units I & II"
subtitle: "{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}"
author: "{{< meta instructor.name >}}"
date: "February 26, 2026"
code-annotations: below
---


## {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="custom-title">
[Lecture 20]{.baby-blue-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Revision: Units I & II]{.white-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Week 5 | Mid-Semester Preparation<br>
{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}<br>
{{< meta instructor.name >}}, {{< meta instructor.title >}}
</div>

---

## {data-menu-title="Exam Coverage"}

[Mid-Semester Exam Coverage]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- **Unit I:** Web Page Designing (HTML & CSS)
- **Unit II:** JavaScript Fundamentals
- Lectures 1-19
- All lab exercises and assignments
- Hands-on coding questions expected
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Unit I Overview"}

[Unit I: Web Page Designing]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. Introduction to Web & Internet
2. HTML Structure & Syntax
3. HTML Grouping: Div & Span
4. Lists, Images, Hyperlinks & Tables
5. HTML Forms & Form Elements
6. CSS Selectors, Box Model & Positioning
7. Bootstrap Framework
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="HTML Basics Recap"}

[HTML Basics Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2-5|6-8|9"}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <title>My Page</title>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>Welcome</h1>
  <p>This is a paragraph.</p>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="HTML Forms"}

[HTML Forms Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
<form action="/submit" method="POST">
  <input type="text" name="username" required>
  <input type="email" name="email" required>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>
```

::: {.body-text-m}
Key attributes: `action`, `method`, `name`, `type`, `required`
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Selectors"}

[CSS Selectors Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
p { color: blue; }              /* element */
.highlight { background: yellow; } /* class */
#header { font-size: 24px; }    /* id */
div > p { margin: 10px; }       /* child */
a:hover { color: red; }         /* pseudo-class */
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Box Model"}

[CSS Box Model Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1-5"}
.box {
  margin: 20px;      /* space outside */
  padding: 15px;     /* space inside */
  border: 2px solid black;
  width: 200px;
}
```

::: {.body-text-m}
**Total width** = margin + border + padding + content
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Positioning"}

[CSS Positioning Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
position: static;    /* default */
position: relative;  /* relative to normal position */
position: absolute;  /* relative to positioned ancestor */
position: fixed;     /* relative to viewport */
position: sticky;    /* hybrid */
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap"}

[Bootstrap Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5-7"}
<link href="bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

<div class="container">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-md-6">Column 1</div>
    <div class="col-md-6">Column 2</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.body-text-m}
Grid system: 12-column layout
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Unit II Overview"}

[Unit II: JavaScript]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. Variables & Data Types
2. Functions & Events
3. Conditional Statements & Loops
4. Objects & Scope
5. Arrow Functions & Callbacks
6. DOM Manipulation
7. Form Validation
8. ES6+ Features
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="JS Variables"}

[JavaScript Variables Recap]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3"}
let age = 25;         // reassignable
const pi = 3.14;      // not reassignable
var old = "avoid";    // function-scoped (old style)
```

::: {.body-text-m}
Use `let` for variables, `const` for constants.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Data Types"}

[Data Types Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5|6|7"}
const name = "Amit";        // string
const age = 22;             // number
const isActive = true;      // boolean
const items = [1, 2, 3];    // array
const user = { name: "A" }; // object
let nothing = null;         // null
let notDefined;             // undefined
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Functions"}

[Functions Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1-3|5|7-8"}
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}`;
}

const greetArrow = (name) => `Hello, ${name}`;

greet("Priya");
greetArrow("Raj");
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Conditionals"}

[Conditionals Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1-7|9-10"}
const marks = 85;

if (marks >= 90) {
  console.log("Grade A");
} else if (marks >= 60) {
  console.log("Grade B");
}

const status = marks >= 60 ? "Pass" : "Fail";
console.log(status);
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Loops"}

[Loops Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1-3|5-8|10-12"}
for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  console.log(i);
}

let count = 0;
while (count < 3) {
  console.log(count++);
}

const arr = [10, 20, 30];
arr.forEach(val => console.log(val));
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Objects"}

[Objects Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1-4|6|7"}
const student = {
  name: "Neha",
  age: 21,
  greet: function() { return `Hi, ${this.name}`; }
};

console.log(student.name);
console.log(student.greet());
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Array Methods"}

[Array Methods Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4"}
const nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
nums.map(x => x * 2);           // [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
nums.filter(x => x > 2);        // [3, 4, 5]
nums.reduce((sum, x) => sum + x, 0); // 15
```

---

## {data-menu-title="DOM Selection"}

[DOM Selection Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3"}
document.getElementById('id');
document.querySelector('.class');
document.querySelectorAll('p');
```

::: {.body-text-m}
`querySelector` returns first match, `querySelectorAll` returns all.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="DOM Manipulation"}

[DOM Manipulation Recap]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
const elem = document.querySelector('.box');
elem.textContent = "New text";
elem.innerHTML = "<strong>Bold</strong>";
elem.style.color = "red";
elem.classList.add('active');
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Event Handling"}

[Event Handling Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2-4"}
const btn = document.querySelector('button');
btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
  alert('Button clicked!');
});
```

::: {.body-text-m}
Common events: `click`, `submit`, `blur`, `change`, `keyup`
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Form Validation"}

[Form Validation Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|3-8|4|5-7"}
const form = document.querySelector('form');

form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  if (validateForm()) {
    console.log("Form is valid");
  }
});
```

---

## {data-menu-title="ES6 Features"}

[ES6+ Features Recap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|3|5|7|9"}
const msg = `Hello, ${name}`;  // template literals

const [a, b] = [1, 2];         // array destructuring

const { name, age } = user;    // object destructuring

const arr2 = [...arr1, 4, 5];  // spread operator

const greet = (name = "Guest") => `Hi, ${name}`; // default params
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Common Exam Topics"}

[Common Exam Question Topics]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. Write HTML form with validation
2. Style page with CSS (box model, positioning)
3. Create responsive layout with Bootstrap
4. Write JavaScript functions
5. DOM manipulation (select, modify, create)
6. Event handling and form validation
7. Array methods (map, filter, reduce)
8. ES6 syntax (arrow functions, destructuring)
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Sample Question 1"}

[Sample Question 1]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
**Q:** Create a registration form with:
- Name (text, required)
- Email (email, required)
- Age (number, min=18)
- Submit button

Add CSS to style the form with proper spacing and colors.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Sample Question 2"}

[Sample Question 2]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
**Q:** Write JavaScript to:
1. Select all paragraphs on a page
2. Change their color to blue
3. Add a click event that shows an alert with the paragraph text
:::

```javascript
const paras = document.querySelectorAll('p');
paras.forEach(p => {
  p.style.color = 'blue';
  p.addEventListener('click', () => alert(p.textContent));
});
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Sample Question 3"}

[Sample Question 3]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
**Q:** Given an array of student objects with `name` and `marks`, filter students with marks > 80 and display their names.

```javascript
const students = [
  { name: "Amit", marks: 85 },
  { name: "Neha", marks: 92 },
  { name: "Raj", marks: 78 }
];

const toppers = students.filter(s => s.marks > 80);
const names = toppers.map(s => s.name);
console.log(names); // ["Amit", "Neha"]
```
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Study Tips"}

[Study Tips]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. **Practice coding**: Don't just read, write code
2. **Review labs**: Go through all lab exercises
3. **Understand concepts**: Don't memorize syntax
4. **Test edge cases**: Empty inputs, special characters
5. **Time management**: Practice within time limits
6. **Debugging**: Learn to read and fix errors
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Key Resources"}

[Key Resources for Revision]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
- **Lecture Slides:** All lectures 1-19
- **Labs:** Lab 1-5 exercises
- **Assignments:** Assignments 1-2
- **Quizzes:** Pre-class quizzes for practice
- **Content Pages:** Week 1-5 content
- **MDN Web Docs:** Reference for HTML, CSS, JS
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Important Concepts"}

[Most Important Concepts]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
**HTML:** Forms, semantic tags, attributes  
**CSS:** Selectors, box model, positioning, flexbox  
**Bootstrap:** Grid system, components  
**JavaScript:** Variables, functions, loops, conditionals  
**DOM:** Selection, manipulation, events  
**Arrays:** map, filter, reduce, forEach  
**ES6:** Arrow functions, template literals, destructuring  
**Validation:** HTML5 & JavaScript validation
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Common Mistakes"}

[Common Mistakes to Avoid]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Missing closing tags in HTML
- Incorrect CSS selector syntax
- Forgetting `const`/`let` declarations
- Using `=` instead of `===` for comparison
- Not preventing default form submission
- Incorrect array method usage
- Forgetting to return values from functions
- Syntax errors in arrow functions
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Final Checklist"}

[Final Exam Preparation Checklist]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
✓ Reviewed all lecture slides  
✓ Completed all lab exercises  
✓ Practiced coding problems  
✓ Tested code in browser console  
✓ Understood error messages  
✓ Reviewed assignment solutions  
✓ Can write HTML/CSS/JS without references  
✓ Confident with debugging
:::

---

## {#end-slide data-menu-title="End Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="page-center">
<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Good Luck with Your Exam!]{.white-text}
</div>
<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Next: Mid-Semester Examination (Units I & II)
</div>
</div>
